primary_sources.title: Join us in New York on April 2 for a Runway Characters Hackathon. In this workshop you'll learn how to create your own custom real-time video agents and bring them directly into your apps, websites, products and experiences. Register now at the link below.
Codex is coming to India 🇮🇳 Join events led by Codex ambassadors to: Get hands-on with Codex Meet developers building with Codex Ship projects at hackathons

supporting_sources.title: Happy Friday from New York! I hope you are creating some great stuff and remember: you are excellent!

fact_anchors.claim: Join us in New York on April 2 for a Runway Characters Hackathon. In this workshop you'll learn how to create your own custom real-time video agents and bring them directly into your apps, websites, products and experiences. Register now at the link below.
